---
title: "Robert Mullins"

about:
  template: trestles
  image: images/me.png
  links: # create buttons
    - icon: linkedin 
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/robert-mullins-176006319/
      target: _blank
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/robert-mullins
      target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:robertdavmullins@gmail.com
---

More [about me](about.qmd).

You might like to look at my projects [projects](projects/)
